items.title_en: Belgium’s KBC Becomes First Bank in the Country to Offer Bitcoin Trading to Retail Investors
items.title_ur: Belgium’s KBC Becomes First Bank in the Country to Offer بٹ کوائن Trading to Retail Investors
summary_en: Belgium’s KBC Becomes First Bank in the Country to Offer Bitcoin Trading to Retail Investors

Bitcoin Magazine Belgium’s KBC Becomes First Bank in the Country to Offer Bitcoin Trading to Retail Investors KBC Group is set to become the first bank in Belgium to allow retail clients to buy and sell crypto.
This post Belgium’s KBC Becomes First Bank in the Country to Offer Bitcoin Trading to Retail Investors first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman .
